textByHash.26ce465edec866cdd168455be429fe46004e45dc: Hi! Would you be interested in some of my fine candles?
textByHash.05075eb895a2eff5705cd80b07b0b6cc8fe823f6: Hmmm. In the candle making trade, we have a tradition that it's very bad luck to make black candles.
textByHash.1329148eb46227a9e26027300d7e50932ea2e9be: IF you can bring me a bucket FULL of wax.
textByHash.16d4f07f58f27a06844926e95bd3822d69237e3b: Have you got any wax yet?
